description_long: This is a small, arched-roof cabin with a modern, utilitarian design, set on a rectangular plot with a striped green and black ground surface. The structure features a curved, metallic roof that extends over the entire length of the building, providing a sleek and weather-resistant appearance. The front facade is open, revealing a wooden interior with a central partition and what appears to be a single entryway. The sides and rear of the cabin are solid, with no visible windows or additional doors, emphasizing privacy and simplicity. The materials suggest a combination of metal for the roof and exterior, and wood for the interior walls and floor. The overall form is compact and functional, suitable for use as a small urban dwelling or garden outbuilding.
description: A compact, arched-roof cabin with a metallic exterior and wooden interior, featuring an open front and solid sides. The design is modern and utilitarian, ideal for urban or garden settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entryway, arched roof, and visible wooden interior with a central partition.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, windowless metallic wall and the curvature of the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a fully enclosed, solid back wall and the continuation of the arched roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid, windowless metallic wall and arched roof.
attribute_roof_type: curved barrel roof, continuous metal cladding
attribute_window_arrangement: No visible windows on any side; all walls are solid and windowless.
attribute_door_placement: Single large entryway centered on the front facade, no other visible doors.
